sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 71

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 71:1
items.html: Just as the Partzufim are explained according to the ten Sefirot, so they are explained according to the holy Names. And it is known that every complete Partzuf necessarily comprises five Partzufim: Galgalta, AB, SAG, MA, and BON. And likewise these five Partzufim exist in the totality of the whole world of Atzilut, and likewise in the totality of the world of AK [Adam Kadmon]. And the whole and the particulars are equal to one another, for every discernment in the lower one is drawn from its corresponding discernment in the upper one.

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 71:2
items.html: Now the Partzuf Galgalta, which is the Partzuf of Keter of the degree or of the world, is the secret of the inner HaVaYaH, in which are the four letters Yod-Hey Vav-Hey. And from each letter in it, one Partzuf is drawn, in the discernment of a clothing for the inner HaVaYaH: from the Yod in it emerges the Partzuf AB; from the Hey in it emerges the Partzuf SAG; from the Vav in it emerges the Partzuf MA; and from the lower Hey in it emerges the Partzuf BON. As was explained regarding the five Partzufim of AK: after the departure of the Guf [body] of the Partzuf Galgalta, the Partzuf AB emerged in the secret of the second expansion, and filled with its Lights the ten Sefirot of the Guf of Partzuf Galgalta. Afterwards the ten Sefirot of the Guf of Partzuf AB also departed, and the Partzuf SAG emerged through the Zivug [coupling] of the Peh of AB, and filled with its Lights the ten Sefirot of the Guf of AB. Thus the first filling [Miluy] of the inner HaVaYaH is the Partzuf AB, which filled the ten Sefirot of the Guf of the Partzuf of the inner HaVaYaH. But the ten Sefirot of the Guf of AB also departed; hence it needs the second filling, of Partzuf SAG, and then the inner HaVaYaH is completed again — for that lack made by the departure of the ten Sefirot of AB, which are its first filling, was completed again by the Lights of SAG. Therefore AB is discerned as the first filling of the inner HaVaYaH, which is Yod-Vav-Dalet, Hey-Yod, Vav-Yod-Vav, Hey-Yod — ten letters. And the Partzuf SAG is discerned as coming and filling the lack made in the ten letters of the first filling — that is, in the discernment of the ten Sefirot of AB. Therefore SAG is called the filling of the filling: each and every letter of the ten letters of AB is filled individually, thus: Yod Vav Dalet; Hey Yod; Vav Yod Vav; Hey Yod — which are twenty-eight letters.

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 71:3
items.html: (to the question) And it has been explained that the simple HaVaYaH is the Partzuf of Keter, for whose completion come the fillings of its letters, which are four clothings for it. The HaVaYaH in a filling of ten letters, which is the first filling of the simple HaVaYaH, is the Partzuf AB, which is its first clothing and filling. And the discernment of the filling-of-the-filling of the simple HaVaYaH, which is the above twenty-eight letters, is the Partzuf SAG, which is the second clothing, and the filling-of-the-filling of the simple HaVaYaH. These two clothings and fillings end above the Tabur [navel] of the simple HaVaYaH — that is, only upon its two letters Yod-Hey. Thus the letters Vav-Hey of the simple HaVaYaH still need clothings and fillings, and they are the two Partzufim called ZON, or MA and BON, which clothe it from the Tabur downward — that is, its letters Vav-Hey. (Item 89)
